reasoning: The control 3_3_5 focuses on the correlation of audit records for investigation and response to suspicious activities. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logging is enabled and properly configured to capture necessary metadata for analysis. Additionally, using admission webhooks to log and monitor changes can help in correlating audit records with system activities.
title: 3_3_5: 3.3.5 Correlate audit record review, analysis, and reporting processes for investigation and response to indications of unlawful, unauthorized, suspicious, or unusual activity
